_meta.note: Settings.json snippet for the Red Hat Copywriter Skill. Drop the 'skillRegistration' block into your project settings.json to register the skill. No MCP server or hooks are required for v1.1.0 — the skill is self-contained and reads standards files by relative path.

mcpServers._note: No MCP server declarations required. The skill reads standards files by relative path. Populate this block if a future version requires external data access (e.g. dynamic terminology fetch from the PMM content API).

permissions._note: No special permissions required. The skill reads from the local references/ and rhel-copywriter-skill/ directories only.
